entry.title: BIP 54 active on Bitcoin Inquisition
entry.summary: The recent release of Bitcoin Inquisition 29.2 introduces support for BIP 54, known as Consensus Cleanup, which became active from block 291168. This update is primarily a bugfix soft fork, distinguishing itself by not adding new features but rather improving the system's robustness. Due to its nature as a bugfix, it presents limited opportunities for testing within the public Signet network. The possibility of creating a Signet block that mimics a slow transaction scenario, albeit not as severe as the worst-case scenario, was suggested. This approach aims to demonstrate the block's invalidity under the new Inquisition protocol, encouraging community members to share their findings. Testing can occur across various environments, including public and private Signet networks, underscoring the importance of community involvement in verifying the update's efficacy.
